title: Naan Pudicha Mosakuttiyae Lyrics Eetti Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Eetti Naan pudicha Mosakuttiyae Song Lyrics
Singers: GV Prakash Kumar & Shakthiree Gopalan
Lyrics: Yegathasi

Naan pudicha mosakuttiyae
En manasa kasakittiyae
Unnoda naanum serndhida serndhida
Athaiku koodaa vaazhndhida vaazhndhida
Vendaannu solladhey
Vel kutthi kolladhey
Pogaadhu un kirukku

En usurey thirudiputtu
Yen da paiyya adagu vecha
Kannaadi bommai naan
Paathuka Paathuka
Kaiyaala enna dhaan
Pothikka pothikka
Sarchaya sollaadhey
Moochellam un mela
Kaartraagi unna thoduven

Meesai kondu oosi naan podanum
Aasai vachu aalathaan parkanum
Vaa ittuli vega vittaayae
Norukku token thandhaayae
Naarkaaliya naan maarava
Dhevadhaye utkaara vaa
Dhooram dhaane eeram pesum
Arugey vandhaa mosamaai poguthey

Phone number bodhaya yethudhey
Pechu ippa paadhaya maathudhey
Noolindri oosi kortheney
Meen vaangi saambhaar vecheney
Haikoo pecha aarambichu
Novel pole aagipochey
Pattaam poochi rekkai vaangi
Idhayam rendu vannangal poosudhey

Naan pudicha mosakuttiyae
En manasa kasakittiyae
Unnoda naanum serndhida serndhida
Athaiku koodaa vaazhndhida vaazhndhida
Vendaannu solladhey
Vel kutthi kolladhey
Pogaadhu un kirukku

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Naan Pudicha Mosakuttiyae conveys a playful and lively spirit, celebrating love and joy.

How does this song fit into the movie Eetti?

This song reflects the youthful energy and romantic themes present in the movie Eetti, enhancing the overall narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features vocals by GV Prakash Kumar and Shakthisree Gopalan, with music composed by GV Prakash Kumar himself.

When was the song released?

Naan Pudicha Mosakuttiyae was released on September 26, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naan Pudicha Mosakuttiyae, the playful and upbeat vibe encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth. The song is a celebration of love and joy, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. It showcases the chemistry between the singers, GV Prakash Kumar and Shakthisree Gopalan, bringing a lively energy to the track. The lyrics reflect a sense of fun and excitement, evoking feelings of happiness and celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Pudicha Mosakuttiyae from Eetti is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With the dynamic collaboration of GV Prakash Kumar and Shakthisree Gopalan, this song is sure to get you on your feet. The catchy beats and playful lyrics make it a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their mood!
stanzaMeanings: I have caught the trickster, my heart is troubled. Don't say that I shouldn't live together with you, don't let your mischief go away.
You have stolen my breath. My dear, I have kept a mirror doll. Look, look, what can I do with my hands? Don't say it's a waste, everything is on you, I will stick to you.
I want to hit with a mustache. I want to see with desire. Come quickly, you have given me a token. I won't change my nature. God, come and help. Distance speaks of deceit when you come near.
I have caught the trickster, my heart is troubled.

What is this phone number? The talk has changed now. I have cut the thread and caught a fish for the feast. The conversation has started like a haiku, it has become like a novel. I have caught a butterfly and brought it to my heart, two colors are painted.
I have caught the trickster, my heart is troubled. Don't say that I shouldn't live together with you, don't let your mischief go away.
